006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.lang.annotation.*;
023import java.lang.reflect.*;
024import java.util.*;
025import java.util.stream.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
030
031/**
032 * A list of {@link AnnotationWork} objects.
033 *
034 * @serial exclude
035 */
036@SuppressWarnings({
037   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
038})
039public class AnnotationWorkList extends ArrayList<AnnotationWork> {
040
041   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
042   private static final String ARG_vrs = "vrs";
043   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
044
045   /**
046    * Static creator.
047    *
048    * @return A new list.
049    */
050   public static AnnotationWorkList create() {
051      return new AnnotationWorkList(VarResolver.DEFAULT.createSession());
052   }
053
054   /**
055    * Static creator.
056    *
057    * @param vrs The variable resolver.
058    * @return A new list.
059    */
060   public static AnnotationWorkList create(VarResolverSession vrs) {
061      return new AnnotationWorkList(vrs);
062   }
063
064   /**
065    * Static creator.
066    *
067    * @param annotations The annotations to create work from.
068    * @return A new list.
069    */
070   public static AnnotationWorkList of(Stream<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>> annotations) {
071      return create().add(annotations);
072   }
073
074   /**
075    * Static creator.
076    *
077    * @param vrs The variable resolver.
078    * @param annotations The annotations to create work from.
079    * @return A new list.
080    */
081   public static AnnotationWorkList of(VarResolverSession vrs, Stream<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>> annotations) {
082      return create(vrs).add(annotations);
083   }
084
085   private final transient VarResolverSession vrs;
086
087   private AnnotationWorkList(VarResolverSession vrs) {
088      this.vrs = assertArgNotNull(ARG_vrs, vrs);
089   }
090
091   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
092   public boolean equals(Object o) {
093      return this == o || (o instanceof AnnotationWorkList other && super.equals(other)); // HTT: super.equals(false) requires populating lists with matching AnnotationWork instances; not practical to test
094   }
095
096   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
097   public int hashCode() {
098      return super.hashCode();
099   }
100
101   /**
102    * Adds an entry to this list.
103    *
104    * @param ai The annotation being applied.
105    * @param aa The applier for the annotation.
106    * @return This object.
107    */
108   public AnnotationWorkList add(AnnotationInfo<?> ai, AnnotationApplier<Annotation,Object> aa) {
109      add(new AnnotationWork(ai, aa));
110      return this;
111   }
112
113   /**
114    * Adds entries for the specified annotations to this work list.
115    *
116    * @param annotations The annotations to create work from.
117    * @return This object.
118    */
119   public AnnotationWorkList add(Stream<AnnotationInfo<? extends Annotation>> annotations) {
120      annotations.sorted(Comparator.comparingInt(AnnotationInfo::getRank)).forEach(this::applyAnnotation);
121      return this;
122   }
123
124   /**
125    * Helper method to extract and apply annotation appliers for a given annotation.
126    *
127    * @param ai The annotation info to process.
128    */
129   @SuppressWarnings({
130      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for annotation applier instantiation
131   })
132   private void applyAnnotation(AnnotationInfo<?> ai) {
133      var a = ai.inner();
134      // Special-case @BeanConfig from juneau-commons. The annotation cannot reference @ContextApply
135      // (which lives in juneau-marshall), so we route it to its Applier directly.
136      if (a.annotationType() == BeanConfig.class) {
137         add(ai, (AnnotationApplier<Annotation,Object>)(AnnotationApplier<?,?>) new BeanConfigAnnotation.Applier(vrs));
138         return;
139      }
140      var cpa = assertNotNull(a.annotationType().getAnnotation(ContextApply.class), "Annotation found without @ContextApply: %s", cn(ai.annotationType()));
141      Arrays.stream(cpa.value())
142         .map(x -> safe(() -> (Constructor<? extends AnnotationApplier<?,?>>)x.getConstructor(VarResolverSession.class)))
143         .forEach(applyConstructor -> {
144            var applier = safe(() -> (AnnotationApplier<Annotation,Object>)applyConstructor.newInstance(vrs));
145            add(ai, applier);
146         });
147   }
148}
